text: >> Hello, can you hear me? [ Inaudible Remark ] >> Can't take your phone now. >> I'm Ethan from Nova Health Care, Tennessee. The reason I'm reaching out to you. >> Please record your message. >> Let's know about a cash back benefit. Help out of the pocket cost of $10,000. Especially when you're in a hospital. To make sure you qualify for this, please confirm with a yes or no if you are under the age of 65. >> I think I didn't hear that. >> Are you under the age of 65? >> Or add your message, press 1. To mark your message urgent, press 2. To mark your message private, press 3. To send your message as is, press pound. >> I'm sorry, I didn't quite get that. Can you please confirm if you are under the age of 65? >> We record or add to your message, press 1. To mark your message urgent, press 2. To mark your message private, press 3. To send your message as is, press pound.
